title: nuphar oguraensis
intro: Nuphar oguraensis, also known as Japanese water lily or lotus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Nymphaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Nuphar oguraensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Nuphar oguraensis are typically made by drying the plant's leaves, flowers, or rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
